# Aarambh '26 — JK Lakshmipat University Orientation

> Aarambh 2026 is the official New Student Orientation and Welcome Festival of JK Lakshmipat University (JKLU), Jaipur, running July 14–21, 2026.

Aarambh '26 welcomes incoming JKLU students with a week-long program combining academic orientation, campus integration, and themed cultural days. The program is organized by JKLU's Office of Student Affairs together with a student organizing committee, under the guidance of Head of Student Affairs Mr. Deepak Sogani. Nine student committees run the week's operations, covering everything from discipline and logistics to feedback and registration.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/): Overview of Aarambh 2026 — what it is, when it runs, and how to get involved.
- [Schedule](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/schedule): Full day-by-day timetable for Aarambh 2026, July 14–21, including the daily theme for each day.
- [Speakers](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/speakers): Guest speakers and sessions held during orientation week.
- [Team](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/team): Organizing committee structure across all nine event committees.
- [Contact](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/contact): Official contact directory — Head of Student Affairs, organizing heads, technical heads, discipline leads, and the feedback & registration lead.
- [Register](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/register): Registration for incoming JKLU students.
- [Rules & Regulations](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/rules): Hostel curfews, code of conduct, and campus rules for orientation week.
- [Gallery](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/gallery): Photos from current and past Aarambh editions.

## Key Facts

- Event: Aarambh 2026
- Dates: July 14–21, 2026
- Daily themes: Open Skies Day (14th), Bollywood Day (15th), Canvas Day (16th), Anime & Toons Day (17th), Ethnic Day (18th), Black & White 90s Day (19th), Healthy & Happy Day (20th), Formal Day (21st)
- Organizer: JK Lakshmipat University, Office of Student Affairs
- Location: JK Lakshmipat University, Near Mahindra SEZ, Ajmer Road, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302026
- General contact: info@jklu.edu.in / +91 141 7107500
